title: Assertion fault:  Text encoding mismatch on value comparison
key_bug_features: Text encoding mismatch on value comparison
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, username TEXT NOT NULL COLLATE NOCASE, email TEXT UNIQUE);
CREATE TABLE comments (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, comment TEXT, FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
INSERT INTO comments (user_id, comment) VALUES (1, 'This is a comment');
